COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-03-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Deborah Neville
Michael C. Hall, Esq., for Plaintiff: Ratana Jiraittewanna.
No appearance by the Defendant: Mesha Aneek Henry.
Exhibit #1 Lease ---------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit #2 Three day notice-----------------ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff for restitution and possession of 1703 17th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94122, Damages of $4,463.64 and costs of $151.30
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

DEFENDANT MESHA A. HENRY NOT PRESENT

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT ORDERS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR AND THE JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. MATTER TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER: SUE M. KAPLAN; CLERK: CLARK BANAYAD, NOT REPORTED (218)

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-08-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Plaintiff: Ratana Jirai Hewanna, present in pro per, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Mesha Aneek Henry.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court ordered this matter off-calendar, Plaintiff has not prove-up to the complaint, and to refile the Memo to Set with help of an attorney.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
